title: sinzau Dust Sheet Roll for Furniture: 4 Rolls 2.4m × 20m Self Adhesive Masking Film Cover Surface for House Renovate Spray Painting - for Floor Wall Cabinets Sofa Car
features: Self Adhesive Dust Sheet Roll is waterproof and dustproof, and can protect indoor furniture, carpets, cabinets, sofas, home appliances, etc. It can also be used as a masking film for car paint.

1 roll of Masking Film can cover an area of 48 square meters (total coverage area 192 square meters) and can be freely cut according to the size of the area. The self-adhesive tape is suitable for most smooth surfaces such as tiles, glass, wood, marble and metal.
Masking film for furniture is ideal for protecting furniture, floors and carpets during painting, or to prevent furniture from accumulating dust when traveling or on business trips.
Plastic sheeting for painting is easy to use, just hold the end of the self-adhesive tape, determine the required length, then stick the film to the surface of the object, pull down and unfold.
Tape and drape painting is ideal for decorators, builders, homeowners and artists to protect items before work.
